quality.data_completeness: High. Contains mechanical details, flavor description, and source information.
quality.formatting_issues: Minor: References to other sections (e.g., [_charm person_](#charm-person)) use Markdown syntax that may need cleanup depending on the target database schema, but the content itself is clear.

charge_effects.effect: Cast one of: Charm Person, Command, or Comprehend Languages (using wielder's spell save DC).

charge_effects.action: Reaction (on successful save against enchantment targeting only self)
charge_effects.effect: Expend 1 charge to turn the spell back on its caster.

charges_system.destruction_chance: Roll d20 on expending last charge; 1 results in becoming a nonmagical quarterstaff.

recommendations: Verify the specific save DC calculation mechanism if the target system handles DCs differently than implied by 'your spell save DC'.
Standardize the source_type_rarity field if it is meant to be parsed into separate fields (e.g., extract specific classes from the description).
